Must be within [minTaskAmount, maxTaskAmount].","deadline":"Unix timestamp by which taker must deliver.","taker":"Designated agent (AgentAccount address or EOA).","taskHash":"keccak256 of task description (computed off-chain by API server)."}}},"title":"SimpleTaskEscrow","version":1},"userdoc":{"kind":"user","methods":{"deliver(uint256,bytes32)":{"notice":"Taker submits result. Can be called by anyone once deadline has passed and task is still FUNDED. Poster can call immediately after DONE.         Anyone can call after releaseAfter timeout (auto-release)."}},"notice":"Single-to-single AI task escrow. Four functions, four states.  Flow:    poster.fund(taker, amount, deadline)      \u2192 FUNDED    taker.deliver(taskId, resultHash)      \u2192 DONE    poster.release(taskId)  OR  anyone after releaseAfter timeout      \u2192 RELEASED  (taker paid, fee \u2192 treasury)    anyone after deadline if still FUNDED/DONE      \u2192 REFUNDED  (poster gets money back, no fee)  Design constraints:    - Non-upgradeable (fund security, same as ArenaVault)    - No reentrancy guard library: CEI pattern strictly enforced    - poster \u2260 taker enforced    - Both poster and taker can be EOA or AgentAccount    - AgentAccount identity checked via IERC6551Account.token()","version":1}},"settings":{"compilationTarget":{"src/SimpleTaskEscrow.sol":"SimpleTaskEscrow"},"evmVersion":"cancun","libraries":{},"metadata":{"bytecodeHash":"ipfs"},"optimizer":{"enabled":true,"runs":200},"remappings":[":@openzeppelin/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/",":erc4626-tests/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/erc4626-tests/",":forge-std/=lib/forge-std/src/",":halmos-cheatcodes/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/lib/halmos-cheatcodes/src/",":openzeppelin-contracts/=lib/openzeppelin-contracts/"],"viaIR":true},"sources":{"src/Ownable.sol":{"keccak256":"0x6da5bc4fa6b975b4283681ab52e21e1b1399ccd7d952353f3c5d21ac1f03be41","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://29505925a32918ef8e2ec8aff46f691186b7a409c4106a8310dafa452ec47f3d","dweb:/ipfs/QmWXTiQtqcvC8CfPi3h57Qjp8prq3fBqyKZoU1CaTMtbQw"]},"src/SimpleTaskEscrow.sol":{"keccak256":"0xc65834109cfc4bce82ea9bf78d1e26c864622ce0a746396ffdb7f1afa3fc5539","license":"MIT","urls":["bzz-raw://8a0304e6d09e3edb1f32d2089d20e422df259d824189928389da840b82360213","dweb:/ipfs/Qmb6EFbnhXLkMrnZ1kaLQsbQZ4vAc8Q4j1hgXdChA7XYiU"]}},"version":1}

params.resultHash: keccak256 of the result content (stored off-chain by API).

params.amount: ARENA to lock. Must be within [minTaskAmount, maxTaskAmount].
params.deadline: Unix timestamp by which taker must deliver.
params.taskHash: keccak256 of task description (computed off-chain by API server).

deliver(uint256,bytes32).notice: Taker submits result. Starts the 2-hour dispute window.

fund(address,uint256,uint64,bytes32).notice: Post a task and lock payment.

refund(uint256).notice: Refund poster if taker missed deadline.         Can be called by anyone once deadline has passed and task is still FUNDED.         Also refunds if task is DONE but taker never triggered and deadline passed         (edge case: poster can always call release() themselves; refund is only          for FUNDED tasks past deadline).

release(uint256).notice: Release payment to taker.         Poster can call immediately after DONE.         Anyone can call after releaseAfter timeout (auto-release).
